final:
// // This module implements a three-input OR gate with additional conditions.
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign Y = (A1 && !A2) || (!A1 && A2) || B1;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a three-input OR gate with additional conditions.
